data.title: Smith+Nephew receives CPT code for CARTIHEAL AGILI-C Implant starting Jan 1, 2027 (NYSE:SNN, #CPT, effective date)
data.description: Smith+Nephew revealed today that the American Medical Association (AMA) CPT Editorial Panel has introduced a Category I CPT code for procedures utilizing its CARTIHEAL AGILI-C Cartilage Repair Implant. The code will be effective starting January 1, 2027. Smith+Nephew is a leading medical technology company listed on the London Stock Exchange (LSE: SN) and the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE: SNN).

data.title: Redtiger introduces F17 Plus, a quad-lens dash cam with rear cabin camera for comprehensive video coverage.
data.description: The Redtiger F17 Plus, launched in Dallas on Oct. 9, 2025, sets itself apart with a specialized rear cabin camera in addition to the standard features present in typical dash cams. This innovative addition allows the device to record both interior and exterior happenings of the vehicle. Created by popular brand Redtiger, known for their dash cams and automotive accessories, the F17 Plus introduces a new level of surveillance with its enhanced capabilities.

data.title: V&V Supremo congratulates Dennis and Mary Kay Dorn for winning at the International Guernsey Show 2025.
data.description: In Madison, Wisconsin on October 9, 2025, V&V Supremo® Foods celebrates the achievements of Dennis and Mary Kay Dorn from Kadence Farm in New Glarus, WI. Their cow, Kadence Fames Lovely ("Fame"), stood out at the International Guernsey Show 2025.

data.title: Infrrd recognized as Leader in 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for IDP Solutions, setting new standards in document processing.
data.description: A company based in San Jose, California, known as Infrrd, specializing in Intelligent Document Processing (IDP), has recently been acknowledged as a Leader in the 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant for IDP Solutions. This recognition solidifies Infrrd's position as a top player in the industry, showcasing their expertise and innovation in IDP technology. The achievement underscores their global leadership in this field and marks a milestone in their journey to success.

data.title: ¡Tú Cuentas! Cine Youth Fest reveals 2025 finalists, ten talented young Latino filmmakers highlighted, promoting culture & social issues.
data.description: In Brooklyn, New York, the ¡Tú Cuentas! Cine Youth Fest revealed its ten finalists for the 2025 film festival, showcasing the work of young filmmakers dedicated to highlighting Latino culture and addressing social issues impacting Latino communities. Over the course of five years, the festival has consistently supported emerging Latino talents and witnessed growth in its offerings. Numerous submissions delve into themes of identity and culture that resonate with the Latino community, reflecting a broader interest in authentic representation and storytelling.

data.title: Luxor launches new Energy business to service over 1GW of Bitcoin mining and data centre clients.
data.description: A company based in Seattle, Luxor Technology Corporation, revealed on October 9, 2025, the introduction of a new arm called Luxor Energy. This new subdivision will cater to Bitcoin miners by offering a comprehensive range of energy solutions. Luxor Energy will operate a Retail Electricity Provider (REP) business accompanied by Level 4 QSE services to support its operations.

data.title: Stock market falls, Dow drops. Nvidia rises, Taiwan Semi with strong sales. Tesla hit, two cybersecurity stocks eye entries.
data.description: On Thursday, a decline was witnessed in major indexes such as the Dow. Notably, Nvidia saw an increase in its stock value as Taiwan Semi, one of its suppliers, reported robust sales figures for September. The overall market condition indicated a drop, with Tesla facing a hit and two cybersecurity companies considering market entries. The live coverage of stock market activities suggested a fluctuating trend during the day.
